title: Study with AI without losing control
description: Manage your syllabi, chat with your documents and generate custom tests. All on your machine, with your own models.
featuresTitle: Everything you need to prepare for your exams
featuresSubtitle: TestForge combines content organization, RAG chat and test generation in a single local tool.
featureOrganizeDescription: Structure your content into folders, subjects, topics and documents.
featureChatDescription: Ask questions and get answers based solely on your material.
featureTestsDescription: Create multiple choice, true/false or short answer tests.
featureRagDescription: Vector information retrieval with pgvector and local embeddings.
featurePrivacyDescription: Your data and models never leave your machine. No external API keys.
featureFastDescription: Designed to be self-hosted and run with Ollama on your own hardware.
ctaDescription: Start by creating your first folder, uploading documents and generating tests with AI.
